languages.text: "Нет, не думаю. Просто пытаюсь понять, как возможно провести здесь столько времени".

traits.locale_text: драфт: не берите в голову, так размышляю, нельзя же быть запертым сотню лет

languages.text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."
languages.original_text: "Нет, не думаю. Просто пытаюсь понять, как возможно провести здесь столько времени".

traits.locale_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."
"No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."
"No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

languages.text: “不，我不知道。我只是想弄明白，怎么会在这里滞留这么久。”
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: “不，我不知道。我只是想弄明白，怎么会在这里滞留这么久。”

languages.text: « Non, j'essaie simplement de comprendre comment il est possible de rester ici aussi longtemps. »
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: « Non, j'essaie simplement de comprendre comment il est possible de rester ici aussi longtemps. »

languages.text: "Hayır. Burada bu denli uzun süre kalmanın nasıl mümkün olduğunu anlamaya çalışıyorum sadece."
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır. Burada bu denli uzun süre kalmanın nasıl mümkün olduğunu anlamaya çalışıyorum sadece."

languages.text: «No, solo intento entender cómo es posible llevar aquí tanto tiempo».
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: «No, solo intento entender cómo es posible llevar aquí tanto tiempo».

languages.text: "Nein. Ich versuche nur zu verstehen, wie es möglich ist, so lange hier drin zu sein."
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: "Nein. Ich versuche nur zu verstehen, wie es möglich ist, so lange hier drin zu sein."

languages.text: 「いいえ、私はそうではありません。ただ、ここにこんなに長くいることが可能なのかを理解しようとしているだけです。」
languages.original_text: "No, I am not. I am simply trying to understand how it's possible to be in here so long."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ、私はそうではありません。ただ、ここにこんなに長くいることが可能なのかを理解しようとしているだけです。」
